basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.post_name: Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing
basic_details.short_information: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially announced the Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. Eligible candidates up to 40 years of age holding M.Sc. Nursing, B.Sc. Nursing, or Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing qualifications can attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in interview details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Nursing, B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing
qualification.details: M.Sc. Nursing / B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with one year clinical experience and registered nurse.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Fellowship Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ACTREC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ACTREC Fellowship Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. Nursing / B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with one year clinical experience and registered nurse.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this fellowship?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess M.Sc. Nursing, B.Sc. Nursing, or Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with at least one year of clinical experience and be a registered nurse.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this fellowship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 32,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the General/OBC category?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC categories is Rs. 12,000/- plus 18% GST.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual position?
faq.answer: Yes, the Fellowship in Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplant Nursing is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.
